products.name: Clownfish
products.description: Bright orange, hardy, great for beginners.

products.name: Blue Tang
products.description: Vivid blue reef fish, needs a large tank.

products.name: Dwarf Seahorse
products.description: Difficult to maintain but fascinating. Requires a small aquarium with no other species.

products.name: Longhorn Cowfish
products.description: Intolerant of other Longhorns. This fish requires a large tank and an expert caretaker for it to thrive.

products.name: Fiddler Stingray
products.description: Originating from the Coral Sea, this beautiful stingray requires an expert caretaker and an extra large tank.
